parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_requests,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'cv' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cv_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'cv' AND status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as cv_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'gov' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as gov_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'gov' AND status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as gov_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'translate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as translate_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'translate' AND status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as translate_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'print' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as print_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'print' AND status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as print_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'data' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as data_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'data' AND status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as data_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'typing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as typing_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'typing' AND status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as typing_revenue
FROM requests
WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE('now', 'localtime')

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_requests,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'cv' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cv_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'gov' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as gov_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'translate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as translate_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'print' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as print_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'data' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as data_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN service_type = 'typing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as typing_count
FROM requests
WHERE DATE(created_at) >= DATE('now', 'localtime', 'weekday 0', '-6 days')
SELECT COUNT(*) as payment_count, SUM(amount) as total_payments FROM payments WHERE status = 'success' AND DATE(created_at) = DATE('now', 'localtime')

parameters.columns: report_date, revenue, requests, top_service, report_text, created_at
